title: Learn 80% of Claude Cowork in Under 20 Minutes
summary: Claude Cowork is Anthropic's desktop application that transforms Claude from a chatbot into a productivity system with local file access, persistent memory, connectors, skills, projects, and scheduled task automation. The tutorial covers seven core capabilities for automating workflows like expense reports and inbox triage.
